affiliatePage.title: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliatePage.subtitle: Transparency and honesty in our content.
affiliatePage.intro: At Trendicore, we strive to be fully transparent with our audience. We want you to know exactly how we monetize our site and why you can trust our recommendations.
affiliatePage.a1: An affiliate link is a special link that, when clicked by a user who then makes a purchase at the destination store (such as Amazon or Shein), generates a small commission for us. This does not increase the price you pay; the cost is exactly the same for you.
affiliatePage.a2: Trendicore currently participates in the following programs:
affiliatePage.p1: Amazon Associates Program: As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases.
affiliatePage.p2: Shein Influencer Program: We collaborate with Shein to showcase the platform's latest trends.
affiliatePage.a3: We only recommend products that we consider interesting, trending, or that bring value to our Gen Z community. Our priority is always style and trend quality, regardless of commission.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Your privacy is our priority.
privacyPage.intro: At Trendicore, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we handle information.
privacyPage.p1: We do not collect sensitive personal data. We only collect basic technical information anonymously, such as your language preference and region, to provide the best browsing experience and products available in your country.
privacyPage.p2: We use essential and analytical cookies to remember your preferences (such as dark mode or your country) and to understand how our site is used. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacyPage.p3: Trendicore contains links to other websites (Amazon, Shein, etc.). Once you leave our site, we have no control over the privacy policies of those external platforms.
privacyPage.p4: If you have questions about this policy, you can contact us through our official social media.

aboutUsPage.title: About Us
aboutUsPage.subtitle: The creative team behind Trendicore
aboutUsPage.intro: Trendicore was built to simplify trend discovery. In a digital ecosystem saturated with content, our team selects and verifies every product that reaches the platform.
aboutUsPage.missionText: Connect our community with products that define their personal style, eliminating unnecessary hours of searching.
aboutUsPage.visionText: Establish ourselves as the go-to platform for trend discovery before they become mainstream.

servicesPage.title: Boost your Vision
servicesPage.subtitle: Trendicore was born to simplify your life. We carefully select the best on the market to save you time and money, while boosting your brand with identity design and tailored technological solutions.
servicesPage.curationDesc: We manually select each product based on real trend analysis from TikTok, Pinterest, and Instagram.
servicesPage.trackingDesc: We compare prices and availability across Amazon, Shein, and other platforms to ensure you get the best deal in real-time.
servicesPage.globalDesc: We analyze global trends, adapting them for the Spanish (ES) and US markets with cultural precision.
servicesPage.partnersSubtitle: We join forces with creative specialists to elevate your brand and prepare you for the digital future.
servicesPage.partner1Desc: Specialist in captivating interfaces and seamless user experiences for e-commerce.
servicesPage.partner2Desc: Creator of memorable visual identities and avant-garde aesthetics for social media.
servicesPage.partner3Desc: Specialist in creating memorable brand identities and visual systems that tell unique stories.

entertainmentPage.title: Entertainment
entertainmentPage.subtitle: Visual culture, lifestyle, and trends beyond shopping
entertainmentPage.viralDesc: Analysis of sounds, challenges, and aesthetics shaping social media trends.
entertainmentPage.lifestyleDesc: Handpicked movie, music, and series recommendations aligned with current trends.
entertainmentPage.comingSoon: Coming soon — more interactive content in development.

termsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
termsPage.subtitle: Website terms of use.
termsPage.intro: By accessing and using the Trendicore website (trendicore.net), you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use this site.
termsPage.p1: Continued use of this website constitutes full acceptance of these terms and conditions, as well as our Privacy Policy.
termsPage.p2: All content published on Trendicore (text, design, logos, product selection) is the property of Trendicore or its licensors. Reproduction in whole or in part without prior written authorization is prohibited.
termsPage.p3: Trendicore contains affiliate links to external platforms such as Amazon and Shein. By clicking these links and making a purchase, Trendicore may receive a commission at no additional cost to the user. Trendicore is not responsible for the products, services, or policies of external platforms.
termsPage.p4: Trendicore acts as a product selection and recommendation platform. We do not sell products directly nor guarantee the availability, price, or quality of linked items. All transactions are conducted directly with the corresponding external store.
termsPage.p5: Trendicore reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon publication on this page. It is recommended to review these terms periodically.

howItWorks.title: From trend to your door in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Our team tracks the aesthetics and products gaining traction on social media and filters them through our Trend Score algorithm.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Every product passes through our curation team: we verify quality, price, and trend authenticity.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We connect you with the best available deal across multiple platforms. No surprises, no middlemen.

brands.heroSub: A proprietary trend intelligence system that analyzes your niche every week and tells you exactly what products to add to your store. No guessing. No wasted time.
brands.problemDesc: You have your Shopify store, your Instagram, but every week you ask: what should I upload? What's trending? What will actually sell? You spend hours on TikTok decoding trends while your competitors are already selling them.
brands.methodSub: Every product we recommend passes through our proprietary 4-filter framework.
brands.methodSDesc: We detect unusual engagement spikes across social platforms.
brands.methodVDesc: We measure growth speed to separate fads from real trends.
brands.methodEDesc: We cross-reference seasonal data to predict optimal launch timing.
brands.methodTDesc: We evaluate market saturation to find profitable gaps.
brands.servicesSub: Everything you need to keep your catalog one step ahead.
brands.service1Desc: Every product comes with a score from 1 to 100. We only recommend products scoring above 70.
brands.service2Desc: A private panel where all trends accumulate month over month. Your intelligence history grows with you.
brands.service3Desc: A monthly session to adjust strategy and plan your next moves.
brands.stepsTitle: From zero to optimized catalog in 3 steps
brands.step1Desc: A one-shot analysis of your store and niche. Within 48h you get a complete roadmap with products, prices, and suppliers.
brands.step2Desc: If the Report convinces you, upgrade to Trendicore OS™. Every week you get new recommendations with Score.
brands.step3Desc: You upload the products. We handle the analysis. Your dashboard accumulates intelligence.
brands.pricingSub: Start with a one-time audit or go straight to the full system.
brands.entryDesc: Try Trendicore with no monthly commitment. Complete niche analysis in 48 hours.
brands.entryF1: Full audit of your current catalog
brands.entryF2: Top 15 trending products with Trendicore Score™
brands.pricingNote: No lock-in · Cancel anytime · Money-back guarantee
brands.faq1Q: Do I need a lot of traffic?
brands.faq1A: No. Designed for stores starting out or looking to grow. We help you choose the right products.
brands.faq2Q: What type of stores do you work with?
brands.faq2A: Shopify, WooCommerce, or any e-commerce in fashion, accessories, tech, or lifestyle for young audiences.
brands.faq3A: Yes, no lock-in. If you don't see value in the first month, we refund you.
brands.faq4Q: What's the difference between the Report and the monthly plan?
brands.faq4A: The Report is a one-time analysis to test our system. The monthly plan includes weekly reports, dashboard, and consulting. Most clients start with the Report.
brands.finalSub: Start with a Launch Report. No monthly commitment.
